case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS VALLECILLO, BERNABE R et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT VALLECILLO, BERNABE R MACIEL, LORENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VALLECILLO, BERNABE R
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MACIEL, LORENA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALLECILLO, BERNABE R MACIEL, LORENA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $31.66 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,031.66 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
STIPULATION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS UNDERLYING ACTION FILED SENT TO JUDGE FOR ORDER.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS ACTION OF MAY-01-2006, GRANTED
MOTION SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS ACTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR HEARING SET FOR MAY-01-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COURT ORDERED DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT VALLECILLO, BERNABE R MACIEL, LORENA
ORDER RE STIPULATION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS CASE WITH PREJUDICE SIGNED BY JUDGE.
